content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty is soft (-0.26%), Bank Nifty weak (-1.09%), PSU Banks down 2%. Energy and Pharma showing relative strength. With 45% deployed and 7 active CNC positions, the priority is position management — trailing SLs on winners and tightening risk on near-SL names. Market breadth is mixed; not a day to add aggressively.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING up +5.7% from entry. Current SL at 1025 is already +4.2% above entry — locking in solid gains. Target 1095 still valid (~5% upside). Stock pulled back from intraday high 1055 to 1041 — VWAP support holding. Holding SL at 1025 (already above breakeven, locks ~4% gain) is appropriate; not tightening further to give the breakout room. NO-OP MODIFY skipped — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, holding above SL 119 (CMP 123). Gold consolidating after correction; geopolitical floor intact. SL gives 3.3% room from CMP — appropriate. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at fresh 52-week high 1437.70, +1.6% from entry. Current SL 1425 is already at breakeven+0.85% — protecting capital. Strong Q4 print + dividend catalyst. Target 1465 within reach. Keeping SL at 1425 (no change) — but emitting MODIFY would be no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NTPC at 407.30, P&L +0.8%. Current SL 407 is ABOVE CMP — would have already triggered on this dip. Loosening SL is FORBIDDEN. Cannot raise SL to 410+ (above CMP). Must EXIT to avoid the SL-above-CMP situation OR accept stop trigger. Reconsidering: SL 407 is essentially at-market; this position is going to stop out on next tick down. Better to recognize this and hold — but SL is already triggered logic. Switching to HOLD with current SL — system will manage exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at 1746, P&L +0.9%. SL 1745 essentially at-market (triggered on next tick down). Position will likely stop out today on any weakness. Cannot loosen SL. Letting it run — if it breaks lower, SL exits at near-breakeven; if Organon catalyst sustains, target 1830 in play. No modify."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, near entry. SL 315 gives ~1.4% room. Defensive utility holding near 52w high. Q4 results May 19. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.6%, intraday gave back gains from 473 high to 466. SL 461 gives ~1.1% room. Q4 results positive but JM has Reduce. Letting setup play out; not adding."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1025 already locks +4.2% gain. Breakout intact, intraday consolidation healthy. Will trail tighter if price reclaims 1050+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within normal range. SL 119 appropriate given gold consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1425 already at breakeven+. Stock at 52w high — letting it run with current trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 407 sits at-market; effectively a tight breakeven trail. Cannot loosen. If it triggers, exit is near breakeven — acceptable risk management."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1745 at-market level. Cannot loosen. Will stop out at breakeven if Organon momentum fades; otherwise rides to 1830."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near entry, SL 315 has adequate room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday volatility post-results normal. SL 461 holds."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HDFCBANK setup interesting (relative strength vs Bank Nifty, strong Q4 print, MACD bullish crossover) — would consider on dip toward 780 or breakout above 794 with volume. RKFORGE, NAM-INDIA, JSWENERGY noted but not adding due to current deployment + power cluster concentration risk (NTPC + POWERGRID already on book). TATAPOWER pending order should be reviewed — it's been open 1948 minutes (~32 hours) and adds power cluster exposure; will reassess next cycle.",
  "portfolio_notes": "45% deployed across 7 CNC names. Two positions (NTPC, SUNPHARMA) have SLs essentially at-market — these will resolve themselves today on either direction; no action possible due to SL-loosening rules. PNBHOUSING and NESTLEIND are the standout winners with SLs already locking gains. 5-day rolling stats are weak (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4) — this argues strongly for restraint on new entries. Three pending orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) are stale (>30 hours old) and should likely be cancelled if not filled — but per schema, MODIFY/CANCEL on pending orders is not in the trading_decision schema; will let them expire or cancel via separate mechanism. Key concern: NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER would push power cluster to ~25% of capital — at the cluster discipline threshold. No new energy/power adds today."
}
